items.description: Disabled vehicle on I-95 northbound between 2.1 miles north of Exit 13: TO I-76 / PA-291 WEST VALLEY FORGE and 1.9 miles south of Exit 17: PA 611 NORTH BROAD ST/PATTISON AVE. There is a lane restriction.
